title: Evidence-guided first experiment for pedestrian_trajectory_prediction
hypothesis: A small, controlled modification aligned with topic priorities can test whether the research direction is feasible: preserve baseline_original outputs; smoke-test every change before full training; prefer small conditioning changes over broad rewrites.
technical_strategy: Plan a minimal intention-conditioning experiment that can be toggled from cfg/virat without changing baseline outputs. Integration points: Add optional per-agent intention/language features in VIRATDataset output. Fuse optional condition features in data_preprocess before initializer/denoiser calls. Inject condition features into LEDInitializer mean/variance/scale branches.
expected_benefit: Produce a measurable baseline delta before larger architecture changes.
risk: offline literature pass may miss stronger related work
experiment should be reviewed before code changes
